input.background: A test of $H_0: p=0.21$ using a sample of $n=$ 57 was not significant $(P=0.103)$. Suppose the true prevalence in the population $p_1$ was 0.31. The task is to calculate the power of the test assuming a two-sided $\alpha$-level of 0.05.
input.question: What is the calculation of the power of the test using the provided values?
